caption: A man with a tall, silver-grey wig, glasses, and headphones is recording a podcast in a room decorated with numerous framed photos. He wears a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders. In front of him is a professional black microphone. The background features a wall of photographs and some clothing items, including a yellow shirt with "LEE" visible. A logo appears on the screen featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth opening and closing as he talks. He remains seated and centered in the frame, with minimal body movement aside from the natural motion of speaking. The lighting and camera angle remain constant, focusing on his upper body and head.
